SITE_NAME.description: Display name for this community's instance (e.g. 'Go Stop Saillans!')

SERVICE_TZ.description: IANA timezone for the community (e.g. Europe/Paris, Europe/London). Used to interpret time-only searches correctly.

RIDE_GRACE_MINUTES.description: Minutes after a ride's flex window closes before it disappears from search results (default: 60)

RETURN_DELAY_HOURS.description: Default hours after outbound departure to pre-fill the return trip time (default: 2)

PHONE_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte AES-256 key for encrypting phone numbers at rest. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32. Optional — phones stored in plaintext if unset.
